title: Assistant Manager (Facility)
description:
Responsibilities

· Oversee maintenance and repair of all building systems (HVAC, electrical, plumbing, fire safety) and critical systems.

· Design, install and update systems that are energy-saving and cost-effective to optimize system performance and meet facility needs.

· Lead troubleshooting efforts for major equipment failures or technical issues in building systems.

· Ensure compliance of engineering systems with relevant local, state, and federal safety regulations, building codes, and environmental standards.

· Participate in risk assessments, ensure regular testing and inspections of safety systems, and implement mitigation strategies to prevent equipment breakdowns or hazards.

· Lead engineering-related facility improvement projects, including renovations, new installations, or expansions of building systems.

· Develop cost-effective budgeting of materials, tools and services for engineering operations, including maintenance, upgrades, and replacements of systems.

· Assist in training and mentoring junior engineers, technicians, and facility staff on new systems and best practices.

· Oversee the selection and management of external contractors or vendors who provide specialized engineering services, ensuring quality standards and safety are met.

· Prepare frequent and timely reports on system performance, maintenance activities, energy usage, and budget expenditures.


Requirements

· Degree/Diploma with at least 5 years of experience in facilities management / engineering, preferably in data centre or critical environment.

· Strong understanding of large-scale M&E facility infrastructure system and high level of accuracy and attention to detail in maintaining facility systems and documentation.

· Proficiency in interpreting engineering drawings and technical manuals, and handling preventive maintenance software and troubleshooting tools.

· Certification in workplace safety (eg. WSQ, WSH) preferred.

· Positive proactive attitude and ethical behaviour.

· Good leadership and team player with ability to work independently and resolve challenges in a fast-paced environment.

· Excellent interpersonal, communication, collaborative and people management skills.

· Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

postedCompany.description: Acme Associates Pte Ltd (ACME) offers Critical Infrastructure Lifecycle Solutions (CILS) for critical infrastructure like Data Centers, providing one-stop solution that includes Audit & Feasibility studies, Design & Build, Project Management and after sale support.
postedCompany.name: ACME ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.
